name: The Throne Room Annex
description:
This is the entrance to the Throne room which lies to the east.  A hall
leads off to the west.  The room is lavishly decorated but there is not
much to see.

exits.description: The Throne Room looms to the east.
A hall looms to the west.

extra_descriptions.description: What a descriptive word that is.  Loom.
